caption: The video depicts a medical professional, dressed in blue scrubs and wearing a patterned surgical cap and mask, leaning over a table in what appears to be a clinical or educational setting. The individual is focused on a document or chart placed on the table, with one hand resting on a green folder and the other near a smartphone. The background shows a whiteboard and a partially visible patient bed covered with a blue sheet, suggesting a simulation or training environment. The text "Day 1" and "Sim Week" indicates that this is part of a structured simulation week for students transitioning into residency. The scene conveys a sense of concentration and preparation, likely as part of a learning exercise.
